text: A 3 a.m. call from the bank.
An unexplained passion for early-2000s pop punk.
The smell of grandma's lasagna.
My therapist making the 'oh no' face.
An unformatted Excel sheet.
The cousin who sells insurance at every family event.
9 a.m. karaoke.
A celebrity crying in the bathroom.
A photocopy of my ID folded in four.
The crush who left me on read.
Being late and blaming traffic.
A bottle of Elmer's glue.
A LinkedIn notification.
The smell of my ex's shampoo.
A 2 a.m. shared ride.
Mom posting 'Good morning' with a lion sticker.
Four hours lost on TikTok.
A meme forwarded by an aunt, with a watermark.
Starting Monday with existential dread.
Awkward elevator silence.
A late tax bill.
Buying donuts at 1 a.m.
Your email signature ending 'Best regards'.
Confusing your boss with your brother-in-law.
A playlist titled 'For Crying While Driving'.
The 7-minute voice note.
My boyfriend playing Fortnite at 4 a.m.
A lost fry under the car seat.
Saying 'thanks, you too' to the movie theater cashier.
Staring at the ceiling at 3 a.m. remembering that 2014 embarrassment.
Getting on the bus without my card.
The GPS voice saying 'your destination'.
Too much hot sauce.
An Instagram story with this week's chart song.
The neighbor's cat judging me silently.
A 6 a.m. pilates class.
The smell of gasoline.
A Tinder match with your ex.
A knock-off Spider-Man piñata.
Going to a baby shower empty-handed.
A 'your package was delivered to a neighbor' notification.
Singing English karaoke very badly.
The animated sticker of a dancing dog.
Five shots of mezcal.
The 'be there in 5' text, sent three blocks away.
A sleepover with your aunts.
The smell of a wet soccer pitch.
A report card from sophomore year.
Google Maps rerouting.
A Zoom meeting with the camera off.
Posting about 'mental health' after three beers.
My cat throwing up on the new couch.
That photo shoot in sweatpants.
An 80-slide PowerPoint.
Elevator music in the dentist's waiting room.
A two-for-one movie ticket deal.
My mother-in-law forwarding prayer chains.
The reason I stopped answering the phone.
A 'family Spotify' subscription that doesn't include me.
Booking a cruise online without reading anything.
The smell of a middle-school gym.
Turning down a really nice scotch.
A TED talk on vulnerability.
My best friend crying at a wedding.
The Slack notification sound.
A mug with a Pinterest motivational quote.
The microwave at 2 a.m.
A Hawaiian shirt with hot-sauce stains.
Deleting your browser history before you die.
A three-hour brunch with lukewarm mimosas.
Pretending to know about wine.
A podcast about stoicism.
A wedding at a vineyard.
Bailing on the plan ten minutes before.
Online therapy with the camera off.
A self-help book covered in pink Post-its.
The collections officer saying my full name.
Required small talk with the dentist.
The year's first earthquake.
Falling asleep in yoga.
